title: Craftable Templates
description: Ever wanted the Snout armor trim but it was too risky? Get this mod, and craft any of the templates you want!
body: With this mod you can craft the armor templates, including the netherite upgrade template, but you will have to grind extra netherite for it! Wanted an armor trim from a structure, but can't find it? Craft it! Look in the gallery for the crafting recipes.
